overview: PretStudio The Boutique is a mobile-first e-commerce marketplace for premium Pakistani ladies Shalwar Qameez, featuring 50+ brands including Sapphire, Khaadi, Maria B, and more. The site offers advanced filtering, a 3-step checkout with COD and mobile payment options, blog content, and a full shopping experience optimized for Pakistani mobile users.
features: Mobile-first responsive design for Pakistani market
12 products (2 real + 10 sample) with image galleries
Advanced filters by brand, fabric, size, price, occasion
Blog with fashion and styling articles
Collections pages for Eid, Wedding, Lawn, and more
